title: Telnyx
html:
Programmable-SMS / voice / numbers vendor Yahir uses for the Outpace iMessage-style step-tracker SMS channel under the VRTL Pirates umbrella. Toll-free verification rejected four times in a row Oct 21 → Nov 4 2025 for missing CTIA disclosures, blocking the SMS launch and bleeding the small remaining credit balance. Functions in the corpus as the friction-vendor that taught the CTIA compliance / toll free verification lesson the hard way.

TL;DR

  • 10 inbound citations — concentrated in the Oct 18 → Nov 20 2025 verification-rejection window.
  • Use case: 9 PM daily leaderboard SMS for Outpace. SMS is the entire product loop — without delivery, there's no app.
  • Failure mode: toll-free verification rejected 4× for missing CTIA disclosures (privacy policy URL, opt-in language, sample messages with carrier disclosure).
  • Cost: depleted Telnyx prepaid credit balance during failed-verification attempts.
  • Forced Yahir to formalize ctia compliance + toll free verification concepts in the vault.

Key facts

  • First mention: 2025 10 22 screenshot 2025 10 22 at 7 51 16 pm 77463179 — initial Telnyx setup.
  • First rejection: 2025 10 23 screenshot 2025 10 23 at 11 24 43 am 77701312 — CTIA disclosure missing.
  • Continued rejections: 2025 10 30 screenshot 2025 10 30 at 7 51 57 pm b5317e6a / 2025 10 31 screenshot 2025 10 31 at 10 58 43 am a276ba4f / 2025 11 04 screenshot 2025 11 04 at 9 26 47 am 5d5b4982 — sequential corrections.
  • Resolution attempt: 2025 11 20 screenshot 2025 11 20 at 6 03 11 pm 3782e3eb — final verification push.
  • Lesson absorbed. ctia compliance + toll free verification now exist as concept pages because of this experience.

Why this matters

Outpace's entire product hypothesis (daily 9PM leaderboard SMS) cannot launch without working SMS delivery. The 2-week toll-free verification block cost Yahir momentum and credit. Lesson: infrastructure dependencies need verified-paths-to-production validated before product-launch dates set.

Source summaries

All 7 direct + 3 cross-page citations:

  • 2025 10 22 screenshot 2025 10 22 at 7 51 16 pm 77463179 — first mention
  • 2025 10 23 screenshot 2025 10 23 at 11 24 43 am 77701312 — first rejection
  • 2025 10 18 screenshot 2025 10 18 at 11 25 17 pm 049c2451
  • 2025 10 30 screenshot 2025 10 30 at 7 51 57 pm b5317e6a
  • 2025 10 31 screenshot 2025 10 31 at 10 58 43 am a276ba4f
  • 2025 11 04 screenshot 2025 11 04 at 9 26 47 am 5d5b4982
  • 2025 11 20 screenshot 2025 11 20 at 6 03 11 pm 3782e3eb

Connections

  • outpace — primary use case
  • vrtl pirates — parent brand
  • toll free verification · ctia compliance — concepts forged here
  • 10dlc — adjacent SMS regulatory regime
  • swiftui · xcode — broader Outpace stack context
